ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "evaporation_rate" REAL /* Evaporation rate at the site */,
  "fractional_return_flow" REAL /* Fractional return flow at the site */,
  "release_volume" REAL /* Release volume from the site */,
  "diversion_volume" REAL /* Diversion volume from the site */,
  "percolation" REAL /* Percolation at the site */,
  "available_supplemental_water" REAL /* Available supplemental water at the site */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "site_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the site (if applicable) */,
  "max_water_level" REAL /* Maximum water level of the site */,
  "min_water_level" REAL /* Minimum water level of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_site_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_type_id") REFERENCES site_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the site type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data collection event */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., sensor reading, manual measurement) */,
  "data_quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the quality of the data collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_events_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_events_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., low water level, high evaporation rate) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "alert_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("alert_resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Audience for the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., historical, operational) */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., construction date, capacity) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was recorded */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., historical records, technical documents) */,
  "metadata_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the metadata (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_metadata_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
